english: rock, mud, stone, or bamboo in the hole

etymology.description: 㐅 depicts a simple form, potentially an early pictographic representation which later evolved into 五 (wǔ, "five") with additional strokes
etymology.interpretation: The character 㐅 is an ancient pictogram found in the 『說文解字』 (Shuōwén Jiězì) that lacks a clear, singular interpretation. Its significance is seen in its influence on later characters like 五 (wǔ, "five"), where it served as a basic structure.
